{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/154591990?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/minnggyuu/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/minnggyuu/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/minnggyuu/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/minnggyuu/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/minnggyuu", "id": 154591990, "login": "minnggyuu", "node_id": "U_kgDOCTbi9g", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/minnggyuu/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/minnggyuu/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/minnggyuu/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/minnggyuu/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/minnggyuu/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/minnggyuu", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-25527", "cvss": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}], "description": "## Summary
The `/static/<group>/<filename>` route accepts `group=".."`, which causes `send_from_directory("static/..", filename)` to execute. This moves the base directory up to `/app/changedetectionio`, enabling **unauthenticated local file read** of application source files (e.g., `flask_app.py`). Severity is **low information disclosure (C:L)**.

### Details
The vulnerable code is in `changedetectionio/flask_app.py` inside `static_content()`:

```
group = re.sub(r'[^\w.-]+', '', group.lower())
filename = re.sub(r'[^\w.-]+', '', filename.lower())
...
return send_from_directory(f"static/{group}", path=filename)
```

The `group` sanitization allows dots, so `group=".."` passes validation.  
This results in `send_from_directory("static/..", filename)`, effectively shifting the base directory to `/app/changedetectionio` and allowing reads of files in that directory.  
The route is unauthenticated, so **any user can retrieve source files** without logging in.

> Limitation: the route only matches `/static/<group>/<filename>` and rejects slashes inside `filename`, so it cannot traverse further to arbitrary system paths like `/etc/passwd`. It is limited to files inside the application package directory.

### PoC
1) Start an instance (example: Docker on port 5050)
```
docker run -d --name cdio -p 127.0.0.1:5050:5000 -v cdio-data:/datastore cdio-local
```

2) Reproduce  
**(URL-encoded traversal)**
```
curl -i http://127.0.0.1:5050/static/%2e%2e/flask_app.py
```

**(curl path passthrough)**
```
curl --path-as-is -i http://127.0.0.1:5050/static/../flask_app.py
```

3) Observe that the response body contains Python source code from `flask_app.py`.

### Impact
- **Vulnerability type:** Directory Traversal / Local File Read
- **Affected users:** Anyone with network access (no authentication required)
- **Scope:** Source files under `/app/changedetectionio`
- **Security impact:** Internal logic exposure can aid further exploitation (Confidentiality: Low)", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00917, "percentile": 0.55519}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-9jj8-v89v-xjvw", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-20T19:06:55Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9jj8-v89v-xjvw", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-9jj8-v89v-xjvw"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-25527"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-02-19T15:16:11Z", "published_at": "2026-07-20T19:06:55Z", "references": ["https://github.com/dgtlmoon/changedetection.io/security/advisories/GHSA-9jj8-v89v-xjvw", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-25527", "https://github.com/dgtlmoon/changedetection.io/commit/9d38b4517364831889b5b0d7b3465fd060403fd4", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/changedetection-io/PYSEC-2026-2124.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9jj8-v89v-xjvw"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/dgtlmoon/changedetection.io/security-advisories/GHSA-9jj8-v89v-xjvw", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/dgtlmoon/changedetection.io", "summary": "changedetection.io is vulnerable to unauthenticated static path traversal", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-20T19:06:58Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-9jj8-v89v-xjvw", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.53.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "changedetection.io"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.53.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: changedetection.io is vulnerable to unauthenticated static path traversal
